answers: Six Sigma = data-driven methodology to reduce defects and improve processes. Goal: 3.4 defects per million opportunities.
DMAIC: Define problem → Measure current state → Analyze root causes → Improve with solutions → Control to sustain gains.
Belt levels: White (awareness), Yellow (team member), Green (leads projects), Black (expert), Master Black (mentor).
Six Sigma uses statistical tools to find and fix problems. Popular in manufacturing, healthcare, and services.
